name: Automate OpenWiki merge and make plan approval readable

elements.name: Plan approved
elements.documentation: Begin only after the stored task-specific diagram has been presented once and approved by the operator.

elements.name: Automate guarded OpenWiki merge
elements.documentation: Make the dedicated maintainer merge its own documentation-only pull request after final review, scope, and Check validation.

elements.name: Refuse stale generation targets
elements.documentation: Require the generated target to remain current immediately before merge; regenerate or stop when main has advanced.

elements.name: Keep ordinary merge authority
elements.documentation: Confine autonomous merge authority to OpenWiki maintenance so every ordinary Change remains operator-merged.

elements.name: Move open to approval boundary
elements.documentation: Finish generation, storage, linking, and verification before any plan viewer is opened.

elements.name: Open final plan exactly once
elements.documentation: Present only the final plan version, once, alongside the explicit approval question; never present intermediate candidates.

elements.name: Retain task-specific detail
elements.documentation: Keep every work-specific action, decision, failure path, and acceptance Check in the plan.

elements.name: Add collapsed delivery call
elements.documentation: Teach plan generation to represent inherited qq delivery as one reusable collapsed call activity instead of expanded invariant nodes.

elements.name: Balance plan-only layout
elements.documentation: Add deterministic plan-mode wrapping that keeps labels readable and the main flow traceable without flattening the diagram into a strip.

elements.name: Preserve OpenWiki layout
elements.documentation: Leave OpenWiki diagram publishing and its existing layout path unchanged while applying wrapping only to plan mode.

elements.name: Add policy and pipeline checks
elements.documentation: Cover merge scope and freshness guards, exactly-once presentation, call activity generation, wrapped plan layout, determinism, and OpenWiki isolation.

elements.name: Checks ready to run
elements.documentation: Join the initial implementation path and either task-specific correction path before running one coherent focused Check suite.

elements.name: Run focused behavior checks
elements.documentation: Run the affected Skill, BPMN pipeline, layout, rendering, determinism, and isolation Checks on the coherent Change.

elements.name: Behavior checks green?
elements.documentation: Decide whether the autonomous-merge safeguards and both plan-mode and OpenWiki-mode pipeline contracts pass their fresh Checks.

elements.name: Fix in-scope behavior failure
elements.documentation: Correct the smallest causal implementation or test defect and rerun every affected focused Check.

elements.name: Review one final presentation
elements.documentation: Have the operator observe one final approval presentation and judge its timing, uniqueness, legibility, and retained task-specific content.

elements.name: Approval experience accepted?
elements.documentation: Decide whether the single final presentation satisfies the operator-visible acceptance boundary.

elements.name: Fix rejected presentation
elements.documentation: Correct an in-scope timing, duplication, layout, or content problem, then rerun the focused behavior Checks before presenting a new final version.

elements.name: Complete qq Change delivery
elements.documentation: Invoke the inherited qq delivery procedure only after every work-specific Check and acceptance step is complete; keep its invariant internals collapsed here.

elements.name: Green PR ready
elements.documentation: End with the reviewed, verified Change green in its pull request and ready for operator disposition.
